text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a fascinating area of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It goes beyond simply reading words; systems can now grasp the meaning behind text understanding, even detecting emotions like happiness or anger through sentiment analysis. This technology is behind many tools we use daily, from machine translation that converts languages instantly to helpful chatbots that answer our questions on websites. As NLP improves, our interaction with machines becomes more natural and intuitive, making communication faster and easier.
